references.hebrew: וְאִם־נֶ֧פֶשׁ אַחַ֛ת תֶּחֱטָ֥א בִשְׁגָגָ֖ה מֵעַ֣ם הָאָ֑רֶץ בַּ֠עֲשֹׂתָ֠הּ אַחַ֨ת מִמִּצְוֺ֧ת יְהֹוָ֛ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹא־תֵעָשֶׂ֖ינָה וְאָשֵֽׁם׃
references.english: If anyone from among the populacecpopulace Lit. “people of the country.” unwittingly incurs guilt by doing any of the things that by GOD’s commandments ought not to be done, and realizes it—

references.hebrew: אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָשִׂ֖יא יֶֽחֱטָ֑א וְעָשָׂ֡ה אַחַ֣ת מִכׇּל־מִצְוֺת֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה אֱלֹהָ֜יו אֲשֶׁ֧ר לֹא־תֵעָשֶׂ֛ינָה בִּשְׁגָגָ֖ה וְאָשֵֽׁם׃
references.english: In case it is a chieftain who incurs guilt by doing unwittingly any of the things that by the commandment of the E<small>TERNAL</small> his God ought not to be done, and he realizes his guilt—

references.hebrew: וְאִם־נֶ֧פֶשׁ אַחַ֛ת תֶּחֱטָ֥א בִשְׁגָגָ֖ה מֵעַ֣ם הָאָ֑רֶץ בַּ֠עֲשֹׂתָ֠הּ אַחַ֨ת מִמִּצְוֺ֧ת יְהֹוָ֛ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹא־תֵעָשֶׂ֖ינָה וְאָשֵֽׁם׃ א֚וֹ הוֹדַ֣ע אֵלָ֔יו חַטָּאת֖וֹ אֲשֶׁ֣ר חָטָ֑א וְהֵבִ֨יא קׇרְבָּנ֜וֹ שְׂעִירַ֤ת עִזִּים֙ תְּמִימָ֣ה נְקֵבָ֔ה עַל־חַטָּאת֖וֹ אֲשֶׁ֥ר חָטָֽא׃
references.english: If anyone from among the populacecpopulace Lit. “people of the country.” unwittingly incurs guilt by doing any of the things that by GOD’s commandments ought not to be done, and realizes it— or the sin of which they are guilty is made known—that person shall bring a female goat without blemish as an offering for the aforementioned sin.

references.hebrew: וְהָיְתָ֣ה עִמּ֔וֹ וְקָ֥רָא ב֖וֹ כׇּל־יְמֵ֣י חַיָּ֑יו לְמַ֣עַן יִלְמַ֗ד לְיִרְאָה֙ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהָ֔יו לִ֠שְׁמֹ֠ר אֶֽת־כׇּל־דִּבְרֵ֞י הַתּוֹרָ֥ה הַזֹּ֛את וְאֶת־הַחֻקִּ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה לַעֲשֹׂתָֽם׃
references.english: Let it remain with him and let him read in it all his life, so that he may learn to revere the E<small>TERNAL</small> his God, to observe faithfully every word of this Teaching as well as these laws.
references.matched_snippet: למען ילמד ליראה את ה אלהיו

commentary_links.hebrew: אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָשִׂ֖יא יֶֽחֱטָ֑א וְעָשָׂ֡ה אַחַ֣ת מִכׇּל־מִצְוֺת֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה אֱלֹהָ֜יו אֲשֶׁ֧ר לֹא־תֵעָשֶׂ֛ינָה בִּשְׁגָגָ֖ה וְאָשֵֽׁם׃
commentary_links.english: In case it is a chieftain who incurs guilt by doing unwittingly any of the things that by the commandment of the E<small>TERNAL</small> his God ought not to be done, and he realizes his guilt—
commentary_links.matched_snippet: &star רבי שמעון בר יוסי אומר משום רבי שמעון אשר לא תעשינה בשגגה ואשם השב בידיעתו מביא קרבן על

commentary_links.hebrew: וְקָרַבְתָּ֗ מ֚וּל בְּנֵ֣י עַמּ֔וֹן אַל־תְּצֻרֵ֖ם וְאַל־תִּתְגָּ֣ר בָּ֑ם כִּ֣י לֹֽא־אֶ֠תֵּ֠ן מֵאֶ֨רֶץ בְּנֵי־עַמּ֤וֹן לְךָ֙ יְרֻשָּׁ֔ה כִּ֥י לִבְנֵי־ל֖וֹט נְתַתִּ֥יהָ יְרֻשָּֽׁה׃
commentary_links.english: You will then be close to the Ammonites; do not harass them or start a fight with them. For I will not give any part of the land of the Ammonites to you as a possession; I have assigned it as a possession to the descendants of Lot.cdescendants of Lot See note at v. 9.—
commentary_links.matched_snippet: תלוי אלא כי תבעי לך אליבא דרבי שמעון
